title: Corn Pico de Gallo with Yummi Pops Nacho White Cheese
description: Fresh corn pico de gallo enhanced with crunchy Yummi Pops Nacho White Cheese.
ingredients: 1 bag Yummi Pops Nacho White Cheese.
instructions: Step 1. Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.
Step 2. Let it rest, then enjoy with Yummi Pops Nacho Cheese.
